testcase.name: verifyDiscountCalculation

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.xpath: //span[contains(@class,'mrp') or contains(@class,'old-price')], but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//span[contains(@class,'mrp') or contains(@class,'old-price')]"}.
